word: H1855 - דְּקַק - dᵉqaq - dek-ak' - Break to pieces

sections.paragraph:
Original: דּקק

Transliteration: deqaq

Phonetic: dek-ak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to break into pieces, fall into pieces, be shattered
    1. (Peal) to be shattered
    2. (Aphel) to break into pieces

Origin: corresponding to H1854

TWOT entry: 2681

Part(s) of speech: Verb
